title: Wither Star Trinkets [Portable Beacons]
description: A Collection of Portable Trinkets Based on the Beacon's Effects.
body:
**JUST ENOUGH ITEMS (JEI) IS RECOMMENDED!**

![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eb88a86e421c9e0e403504bbd1aa4c36a142927.png)


I've always enjoyed Minecraft's natural progression of gear/equipment, going from just a few tools to a shield, to carrying a totem on you, to having an Elytra ready to go alongside some rockets, etc... But Vanilla quickly hits the ceiling of the variety of active equipment you carry with you for adventuring.

Alongside this, beacons can feel like a waste of time and resources to some, the structure's powers are strong but its limited range and high building cost are often not worth the trouble for exploring focused players.

As a solution, this mod aims to add 3 [Currently] items, expanding the use of beacon-related powers, all crafted after killing The Wither Boss, that provide the various effects of a beacon, except for jump boost for convenience's sake (replaced with Fire Resistance), at the cost of the item's durability and a cooldown.

**1.1 Update: Modified Villager Phylactery, changelog for more info.**

**Below are the recipes:**

![De-Activated Nether Star Trinket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8caac60d5626ae92ba8b261b004f6b7252c155df.png)
![De-Activated Nether Star Trinket Description Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69224ca1546d17b88b31dae935e05eb43972d24d.png)

Crafted using a Beacon, 1 Nether Star, 1 Block of Iron/Gold/Emerald/Diamond/Netherite, and 2 Obsidian.

![Activated Nether Star Trinket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06af19ecbdbc7dc5a0409e32da85a5cf1d5495ba.png)
![Activated Nether Star Trinket Description Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d497fab3a3c6c5dee110df641bdb35a6591727.png)

Crafted using a De-Activated Nether Star Trinket, 2 Crying Obsidian, 2 Obsidian, and 4 Blaze Powder

![Villager Phylactery Star](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fee2c322a34efb560d961de8f8d973fa22ddc64e.png)
![Villager Phylactery Star Description Tooltip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5be0384fc6b180baba121580b509b2e9ec48925e.png)

Crafted using a De-Activated Nether Star, 1 Totem of Undying, 4 Haybales, and 3 Emerald Blocks.

CURIOS Equipment Slots Compatibility Planned for a future update.
